query: Find 10 buildings in Drammen municipality that intersect 200-year flood zones, sorted by distance to the nearest quick-clay hazard zone ascending.

2.description: get 200-year flood zones filtered by municipality geometry

5.description: get quick-clay hazard zones filtered by municipality geometry

6.description: find nearest quick-clay hazard zone for each building

7.description: calculate distance from each building to its nearest quick-clay hazard zone

8.description: collapse to one row per building with minimum distance to quick-clay hazard zone

9.description: sort buildings by distance to quick-clay hazard zone ascending, then by building ID ascending
